department: Lipa City Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Office

external_services.office: City Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Office

steps.client_step: 1. Report the incident via phone call, radio call, or personal request
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.2: Receive/verify info and dispatch ambulance or coordinate with barangay/hospitals if units are unavailable
steps.person_responsible: Dispatch Officer on Duty, City Response Personnel

steps.client_step: 2. Follow up the progress of the reported incident
steps.agency_action: 2.1-2.2: Provide feedback and monitor responder status/actions
steps.person_responsible: Dispatch Officer on Duty, City Response Personnel

external_services.service_name: Request for Review of CCTV Recorded Incidents
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Review of CCTV Recorded Incidents
external_services.office: City Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Office
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Businesses, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: Government agencies, private companies, private individuals

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Letter of request addressed to the CDRRM Officer (1 original copy)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit letter of request and wait for approval
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.3: Record request, forward to City Administrator for evaluation and approval/disapproval
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Administrative Aide II, City Administrator

steps.client_step: 2. Wait for the review schedule and answer queries from personnel
steps.agency_action: 2. Interview client and set review schedule (if approved) or inform of disapproval
steps.person_responsible: Dispatch Officer on Duty, Engineering Assistant

steps.agency_action: 3. Facilitate review and assist client in securing information
steps.person_responsible: Dispatch Officer on Duty, Administrative Aide IV/I

external_services.service_name: Request for the Conduct of Capacity Building Activities
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for the Conduct of Capacity Building Activities
external_services.office: City Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Office
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Businesses, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: Government agencies, private companies, schools, NGOs

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Letter of request or electronic mail (cdrrmc_lipa@yahoo.com) (1 original copy)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit request letter or email and wait for approval
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.3: Record request and obtain City Administrator's evaluation/approval

steps.client_step: 2. Wait for the schedule of training
steps.agency_action: 2. Set schedule for activity or inform of disapproval
steps.person_responsible: Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Officer
DRRM Officer, Operations and Warning Division Officer

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Letter of request or electronic mail (cdrrmc_lipa@yahoo.com) (1 original copy)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit request letter or email and wait for approval
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.3: Record request and obtain City Administrator's evaluation/approval
